description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish to Pypi that allows manual dispatch. The workflow should have three jobs: build_wheels to build wheels on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, windows-2019, macos-12), build_sdist to build a source distribution on ubuntu-latest, and upload_pypi to upload the artifacts to PyPI using a token from secrets. The upload job should depend on the successful completion of the build jobs.
